title: 10 best herbal teas for urinary calculus
intro_desc: Herbal teas for urinary calculus are natural remedies that help dissolve and prevent kidney stones, also known as urinary calculus, by promoting urine flow and reducing inflammation. The best herbal teas for this condition include Juniperus communis, Berberis vulgaris, Arctostaphylos uva-ursi, Taraxacum officinale, Equisetum arvense, Silybum marianum, Arctium lappa, Urtica dioica, Pyracantha coccinea, and Juniperus oxycedrus. If left untreated, urinary calculus can cause severe pain, infections, and even kidney damage, leading to missed workdays, hospitalizations, and a significant decline in overall quality of life.
